base_forwarding_rule.description: Defines the core configuration of the forwarding rule in Google Cloud

creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp marking when the forwarding rule was created

effective_labels.description: Labels applied to the forwarding rule for organization and filtering

forwarding_rule_id.description: Unique identifier for managing the forwarding rule resource

id.description: Resource ID used for internal and API references

label_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint for tracking updates to labels on the resource

psc_connection_id.description: Identifier for Private Service Connect connections associated with the rule

psc_connection_status.description: Current status of Private Service Connect connections

self_link.description: URL for accessing the forwarding rule resource directly

service_name.description: Name of the service associated with the forwarding rule

terraform_labels.description: Labels explicitly set in Terraform for the forwarding rule
